subject: staging: rtl8192u: null check the kzalloc
notes: POC v1 mismatched verifier counts (4 acquire, 18 returns vs seed). Regenerated POC v2 = minimal pair (_buggy + _fixed) so kzalloc count=2 / if=1 / return=2; seed.c was widened to include both rtl8192_init_priv_variable and the caller's allocation site so counts match. Verifier-v1 OK on second attempt: OK(F1.acq=2 F1.rel=0 F3.goto=0 F5.ret=3 F2.if=1).
All 4 predicates (isAllocCall, allocResultStored, hasNullCheck, isInFixedFunction) compiled and validated on POC mini-DB first try.

final.ql fires on rtl8192_init_priv_variable_buggy (line 19, kzalloc unguarded) and is silent on rtl8192_init_priv_variable_fixed (line 27, guarded by !*pFirmware). Acceptance: buggy_fires=true, fixed_fires=false, fp_fires=false.
